name: Platform Configuration
summary: Configure core platform components, forms, layouts, searches, and governance settings.

name: Workflow Design
summary: Model approvals, transitions, escalations, branching logic, and fulfillment flow.

name: Form and Layout Design
summary: Design usable record views and input layouts that reduce friction and improve data quality.

name: Reporting and Analytics
summary: Build saved searches, dashboards, KPIs, and operational reporting views.

name: Automation Thinking
summary: Choose the right automation layer and design reusable, supportable logic.

name: API Integration
summary: Design secure data exchange, mapping, authentication, and monitoring across systems.

name: Authentication and Security
summary: Handle access, permission boundaries, authentication, and safe connection patterns.

name: Endpoint Operations
summary: Manage inventory, targeting, device groups, deployment health, and rollout controls.

name: Mobility Governance
summary: Manage enrollment, ownership, app delivery, compliance, and user impact.

name: Asset Lifecycle Management
summary: Track assets from procurement through deployment, refresh, and retirement.

name: Discovery and Reconciliation
summary: Normalize inventory, reconcile sources, and improve trust in asset data.

name: Patch Strategy
summary: Plan rings, prioritize risk, validate deployments, and manage compliance reporting.

name: Frontline Flow Design
summary: Simplify handheld and browser-driven flows for task workers.

name: Troubleshooting
summary: Diagnose failures, investigate logs, and explain remediation steps clearly.

name: Stakeholder Communication
summary: Explain technical design and operational impact clearly to business and IT teams.
